events.event: Case auto-created by the Target Visibility Gate, promoted from candidate T-AU-2026-00118 (BG College of Vocational Education and Training Pty Ltd (trading as Safeguard School of Trades)). Promotion required at least one independently verified source_evidence entry — see dfapti/rules/factualism-audit.md.

Manual evidence sweep found the two actual individual-facing ASQA notices (April 2026) covering BG College's CPC- and CPP-coded qualifications, more direct primary documents than the general cancellation summary page already recorded.
